# publish

Sidebar entry and filterable tree pane for pre-publish plugin review. Shows
the full plugin tree with stats; selecting a plugin opens the plugin-view
detail pane as the adjacent Miller column. No server component — data is
served by the sibling plugin-view plugin.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sidebar entry and filterable tree pane for pre-publish plugin review.
- Contributes:
  - `Pane.Register` `publish`
  - `Shell.Sidebar` "Publish" (group `System`)
  - `publishPane.open`
